headline: Sempra Infrastructure Announces In-Service of Port Arthur Pipeline Louisiana Connector
summary: Sempra Infrastructure, a subsidiary of Sempra (NYSE: SRE), today announced that its Port Arthur Pipeline Louisiana Connector project has been placed in-service.
